title: There will be a time and place for that

script.text: 플렉스 한 강아지의 새 주인 찾기 대모험
아니 지난주에 우리 청취자분들 중에 많은 분들이
이 크리스씨 살짝 코맹맹이 소리난다고 걱정하시더라고요
Can you tell by my voice?
My voice sounds pretty good today?
네 그래서 이렇게 걱정을 해주시는 문자 메시지도 보내셨거든요
If my voice changes just a tiny bit
They know exactly what's wrong with me
아주 센스티브하게 우리는 다 알아챌 수가 있죠
Let's talk about the production crew of this movie
Anyway thanks for worrying about me
We can call them as world class
About the crew of this movie
They've done for some special effects of some great films such as Avengers 시리즈랑
그리고 Ant-Man 시리즈 이런 것들을 했대요
특히 슈렉 시리즈의 프로듀서 팀이 뭉친 작품이라고 하더라고요
So we do have a world class team here
And he is a very well-known composer
The movie based on a book
And it won a lot of awards
In the middle of the ocean
It was thrilling at the moment
That is a very true saying
You can never be the best
이 내용 한 번 더 들어볼게요
And they're going to sting you
They're going to hold him hostage
until he gets a lot of money
I didn't give the signal yet
그럴 때와 주어진 장소가 있을 거야
워, 워, 지금은 아직 안 돼
This is a very common expression
If your kid is doing something inappropriate
Hey, there's a time and place for that
자, 이 부분 한 번 더 확인해 볼게요
When I give the signal to attack
No, no, not yet, my little friends
There will be a time and place for that
